seoTitle: Elizabeth Hills vs Ellalong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Elizabeth Hills vs Ellalong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elizabeth Hills and Ellalong.
heading: Elizabeth Hills vs Ellalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elizabeth Hills, New South Wales and Ellalong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elizabeth Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ellalong (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elizabeth Hills or Ellalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Hills has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Ellalong scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Hills scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Ellalong scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elizabeth Hills or Ellalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elizabeth Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
